name: pff team grades default behavior
expected_query: with "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", t734afa63c517a54c5bbd61dd5c5ebbf4.grades_overall as pff_team_grades_overall_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "pff_team_seasonlogs" as "t734afa63c517a54c5bbd61dd5c5ebbf4" on "t734afa63c517a54c5bbd61dd5c5ebbf4"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "t734afa63c517a54c5bbd61dd5c5ebbf4"."year" = "player_year_teams"."year" where player.pos IN ('TEAM') group by t734afa63c517a54c5bbd61dd5c5ebbf4.grades_overall, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
